claims.summary: Dynamic noise and pressure-room helpers are reviewable but do not currently govern ESN::step.
claims.disposition: verify the helpers remain outside the active reservoir step

claims.summary: Pressure-room interpolation should remain bounded, finite, and continuous.
claims.disposition: verify three focused dynamic-noise pressure-room tests and existing non-finite fallbacks

claims.summary: Recorded entropy and pressure should be compared with candidate noise before any live wiring.
claims.disposition: route a deterministic fixture replay over entropy, gradient, pressure, and foothold

claims.summary: Wiring dynamic noise, viscous rho, or adaptive pressure thresholds into ESN::step changes live reservoir behavior.
claims.disposition: preserve an exact Tier 5 operator-approval wait
